patterns: Missing structured data on product pages
quickWins: Add Product schema to top-10 product pages

findings.title: Missing meta descriptions on 12 pages
findings.befund: 12 of 50 crawled pages have no meta description tag.
findings.auswirkung: Search engines generate auto-snippets, reducing CTR predictability.
findings.empfehlung: Author unique meta descriptions (120-155 chars) for all 12 pages, prioritising those with highest organic traffic.

findings.title: No HTTPS on 3 internal resources (mixed content)
findings.befund: 3 pages load HTTP images, triggering browser mixed-content warnings.
findings.evidence: Chrome DevTools: mixed content reported on /category/shoes, /category/bags, /product/belt-01
findings.auswirkung: Browser warning may block resources; negative trust signal for users and crawlers.
findings.empfehlung: Update all asset URLs to HTTPS; enforce HSTS.

findings.title: Product schema missing on top product pages
findings.befund: Top-10 product pages lack Product/Offer schema; rich results not eligible.
findings.evidence: Google Rich Results Test: no eligible rich result type detected
findings.auswirkung: Missed rich result eligibility (price, availability, ratings in SERP).
findings.empfehlung: Implement JSON-LD Product schema with Offer (price, availability, currency) on all product pages.

positives: All pages return HTTPS (except 3 mixed-content resources)
Canonical tags correctly self-referential on 47/50 pages
htmlLang set correctly on all pages

todos: Fix mixed content on 3 pages (hoch, quick)
Implement Product schema on top-10 product pages

caveats: Sample covers landing pages only; blog posts not crawled.
JavaScript-rendered content not evaluated in this run.
